subject: Norton Nimnul from Chip 'n Dale Rescue Rangers — a round, goggle-wearing villain scientist in a lab coat holding a ray gun amid menacing creature creatures
description: A heavyset, bespectacled humanoid figure in a white lab coat stands in a wide aggressive stance, holding a ray gun device in one hand. The figure wears large goggle-like glasses and has an expression of villainous excitement. Flanking the figure on both sides are threatening creature entities — on the left a dark tentacled or shadowy creature, on the right a large blue crustacean or crab-like creature with glowing blue energy. The setting appears to be an arid outdoor rocky landscape under a dramatic sky. The composition reads as a villain showcasing their terrible invention surrounded by monstrous allies.
foreground: Round lab-coated scientist with goggles holding a ray gun device
background: Arid rocky landscape with dark tentacled creature and blue crustacean-like creature flanking
emotion: manic villainous triumph, wide-eyed with excitement
